title: MicroSim Template
description: Template for creating new p5.js MicroSims with basic canvas setup and drawing examples. Demonstrates standard structure and best practices for educational simulations.
creator: Dan McCreary
subject: Template
p5.js
MicroSim
Canvas Drawing
Tutorial
learningObjectives: Understand the key concepts of template
Apply knowledge of template to solve problems
Experiment with parameters to observe their effects on template
